overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character traversing a steep coastal cliff face beside a large body of water. The character progresses from walking along a narrow ledge to climbing vertical rock sections, with a brief chaotic fall event mid-sequence. The environment features natural coastal mountain scenery with distant islands visible across the water under partly cloudy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside ledge above coastal water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow cliff ledge with the ocean visible to the left and rock face to the right

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff wall with layered sedimentary texture forming the right boundary of the path
calm body of water extending to the horizon with distant landmasses visible
hazy mountain silhouettes across the water under partly cloudy skies
sparse low bushes growing on the cliff edge between the path and the drop

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a narrow dirt trail carved into a steep coastal cliff. The ocean stretches out to the left with distant mountains visible across the water, while the rugged cliff face rises immediately to the right. Sparse vegetation clings to the cliff edge as the character maintains a consistent walking pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep cliff climbing section with handholds

events.description: terrain steepens significantly requiring transition from walking to hands-on climbing

agents.ego_description: climbing up the increasingly vertical rock face using handholds and footholds while hugging the cliff wall

entered.detail: single pine tree growing from a crevice in the cliff face above the character

segments.scene_description: The path becomes too steep for walking, and the character transitions to climbing, grasping the rock face as she ascends. A lone pine tree grows from the cliff wall ahead, and the distant mountains shift to the left as the character changes direction slightly while climbing.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical rock face during rapid movement

events.description: character loses footing or slips causing rapid downward camera movement close to the rock surface

agents.ego_description: sliding or falling down the rock face with uncontrolled rapid movement

entered.detail: close-up textured rock surface filling the frame during the rapid descent

segments.scene_description: The character loses her grip and slides rapidly down the cliff face, causing the camera to tumble chaotically close to the rock surface. The view becomes dominated by blurred rock texture as the character descends, temporarily losing sight of the ocean and surrounding landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep cliff ascent with coastal view

events.description: camera stabilizes and character regains controlled upward movement
character reaches higher elevation with wider panoramic view of the ocean and islands

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily up the rock face with controlled movements, eventually reaching a higher vantage point

entered.detail: expansive view of the water body returning to visibility as character ascends
distant islands and mountains visible again from the higher elevation

segments.scene_description: After the brief fall, the character resumes climbing with steady upward progress. The camera stabilizes and pulls back to reveal the ocean view once again. As she reaches higher ground, the panoramic view expands to show the full coastal scenery with distant islands visible across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rugged coastal cliff that transitions from a steady trek to a chaotic descent before culminating in a panoramic ascent. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt trail carved into the cliffside, with the vast ocean and distant mountains stretching out to the left. As the terrain becomes too steep for walking, the camera shifts upward as the character begins climbing the rock face past a lone pine tree. This steady progress is suddenly interrupted when the character loses her grip, causing the camera to tumble chaotically against blurred rock textures during a rapid slide down the cliff. Finally, the camera stabilizes as she resumes her climb, pulling back to reveal an expanding panoramic view of the coastal scenery and distant islands across the water.
